member.name: M:CrosshairMaker.Animator.AnimationDictionary.AddNewAnimation(System.Int32)
member.summary: Add an animation the same size as the others in this AnimationDictionary with given key , returns the key if sucessful throws an error if AnimationDictionary is empty throws an error if key is already contained in this AnimationDictionary

member.name: M:CrosshairMaker.Animator.AnimationDictionary.AddNewAnimation
member.summary: Add an animation the same size as the others in this AnimationDictionary in first avaliable key between 0 -> (int.MaxValue - 1) , returns the key if sucessful throws an exception if AnimationDictionary is empty throws an exception if all keys from 0 to (int.MaxValue - 1) are filled

member.name: P:CrosshairMaker.Animator.AnimationDictionary.AnimationSize
member.summary: Returns the expected animation size based on the setters

member.name: F:CrosshairMaker.Animator.AnimationValueSetter.FloatSetters
member.summary: with CrosshairAnimation, links the floats values with the corresponding setter

member.name: F:CrosshairMaker.Animator.AnimationValueSetter.IntSetters
member.summary: with CrosshairAnimation, links the ints values with the corresponding setter

member.name: F:CrosshairMaker.Animator.AnimationValueSetter.ColorSetters
member.summary: with CrosshairAnimation, links the color values with the corresponding setter

member.name: F:CrosshairMaker.Animator.CrosshairAnimation.Floats
member.summary: target float values for animation

member.name: F:CrosshairMaker.Animator.CrosshairAnimation.Ints
member.summary: target int values for animation

member.name: F:CrosshairMaker.Animator.CrosshairAnimation.Colors
member.summary: target colors, with interpolation mode

member.name: P:CrosshairMaker.Animator.CrosshairAnimation.Sizes
member.summary: Sizes of target properties

member.name: M:CrosshairMaker.Animator.CrosshairAnimation.Copy
member.summary: Creates a copy of the animation

member.name: M:CrosshairMaker.Animator.CrosshairAnimation.ToString(System.String)
member.summary: Prints data contained in animation

member.name: P:CrosshairMaker.Animator.CrosshairAnimation.Empty
member.summary: Creates an empty animation

member.name: M:CrosshairMaker.Animator.CrosshairAnimation.FromData(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Single},System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Int32},System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Color},CrosshairMaker.Animator.ColorInterpolationMode)
member.summary: Creates an CrosshairAnimation from lists of float, int , colors and possibly color interpolation mode
member.param: List of float in given animation
List of ints in given animation

member.name: M:CrosshairMaker.Animator.CrosshairAnimation.FromData(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Single},System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Int32},System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Color},System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{CrosshairMaker.Animator.ColorInterpolationMode})
member.summary: Creates an CrosshairAnimation from lists of float, int , colors and possibly color interpolation modes
member.param: List of float in given animation
List of ints in given animation
List of Colors in given animation
[Optional] List of interpolation mode for colors, if this list is shorter than the colors parameter , the HSV interp mode is used by default

member.name: M:CrosshairMaker.Animator.CrosshairAnimation.FromData(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Single},System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Int32},System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{CrosshairMaker.Animator.InterpolatableColor})
member.summary: Creates an CrosshairAnimation from lists of float, int , colors and possibly color interpolation modes
member.param: List of float in given animation
List of ints in given animation
List of InterpolatableColor in the animation

member.name: M:CrosshairMaker.Animator.CrosshairAnimation.FromPropertyCount(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Single,System.Int32,System.Nullable{CrosshairMaker.Animator.InterpolatableColor})
member.summary: Create CrosshairAnimation from the size of float properties, int properties and interpolableColor properties, default values can be specified

member.name: M:CrosshairMaker.Animator.CrosshairAnimation.FromPropertyCount(System.Int32[],System.Single,System.Int32,System.Nullable{CrosshairMaker.Animator.InterpolatableColor})
member.summary: Create CrosshairAnimation from the size of float properties, int properties and interpolableColor properties, default values can be specified
member.param: Array containing the count of each properties like so : [float,int,InterpolatableColor]

member.name: E:CrosshairMaker.Animator.CrosshairAnimator.OnAnimationStarting
member.summary: Event fired when animation starts

member.name: E:CrosshairMaker.Animator.CrosshairAnimator.OnAnimationEnd
member.summary: Event fired when animation ends

member.name: E:CrosshairMaker.Animator.CrosshairAnimator.OnAnimationReseting
member.summary: Event fired when animation starts to reset (when ResetAnimation is called)

member.name: E:CrosshairMaker.Animator.CrosshairAnimator.OnAnimationReset
member.summary: Event fired when animation is done reseting

member.name: E:CrosshairMaker.Animator.CrosshairAnimator.OnAnimationInterupted
member.summary: Event fired when animation or PlaybackSpeed is changed before completing, the old Progress will still be used to complete the new animation

member.name: E:CrosshairMaker.Animator.CrosshairAnimator.OnAnimationCancelled
member.summary: Event fired when the animation is interrupted and both Progress and Playbackspeed are reset

member.name: M:CrosshairMaker.Animator.CrosshairAnimator.ScanForCrosshair
member.summary: Scans the current GameObject for a IAnimatableCrosshair component

member.name: M:CrosshairMaker.Animator.CrosshairAnimator.AddAnimation
member.summary: Adds a new configurable animation to the crosshair

member.name: P:CrosshairMaker.Animator.CrosshairAnimator.AnimationIndex
member.summary: Current animation Index

member.name: P:CrosshairMaker.Animator.CrosshairAnimator.Progress
member.summary: Animation progress from 0 to 1

member.name: P:CrosshairMaker.Animator.CrosshairAnimator.ProgressMultiplier
member.summary: Sets the progress multiplier to change the animation amplitude, default is 1

member.name: P:CrosshairMaker.Animator.CrosshairAnimator.Easing
member.summary: Easing of animation, used to calculate Progress

member.name: F:CrosshairMaker.Animator.CrosshairAnimator.AnimationDuration
member.summary: Duration in seconds for progress to go from 0 to 1 when PlayAnimation is called

member.name: F:CrosshairMaker.Animator.CrosshairAnimator.AnimationWait
member.summary: Duration in seconds for the between the end of the animation and calling ResetAnimation, if set to -1 ResetAnimation is never called automatically

member.name: F:CrosshairMaker.Animator.CrosshairAnimator.AnimationResetDuration
member.summary: Duration in seconds for progress to go from 1 to 0 when ResetAnimation is called

member.name: P:CrosshairMaker.Animator.CrosshairAnimator.PlaybackSpeed
member.summary: Current playback speed

member.name: P:CrosshairMaker.Animator.CrosshairAnimator.Target
member.summary: The crosshair animated by this component

member.name: P:CrosshairMaker.Animator.CrosshairAnimator.CurrentCrosshair
member.summary: Target as string

member.name: P:CrosshairMaker.Animator.CrosshairAnimator.CurrentCrosshairID
member.summary: Target id

member.name: P:CrosshairMaker.Animator.CrosshairAnimator._AnimationDataStr
member.summary: AnimationDictionary
